title: cardiopteridaceae
intro: The rank cardiopteridaceae refers to a family of plants, which is a taxonomic grouping that consists of related genera and species. A family is a level of classification that groups plants with similar characteristics and evolutionary relationships. The Cardiopteridaceae family includes plants such as Cardiopteris, which are typically found in tropical and subtropical regions. This family is part of the larger group of plants known as angiosperms, characterized by their flowering structures.
